description: Build and deployment documentation corpus for SWEObeyMe
purpose: Provide comprehensive build and deployment documentation for VS Code extensions

documents.title: esbuild API Documentation
documents.author: esbuild
documents.description: Official esbuild API documentation and configuration guide
documents.relevance: Understanding esbuild configuration for extension bundling

instructions.addingDocuments: Place resources in appropriate subdirectories. Update this index.json with document metadata including title, author, description, license, topics, and relevance.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from esbuild documentation, vsce documentation, and reputable build/deployment resources. Prioritize official documentation.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear, descriptive filenames with underscores: tool_name.html, pattern_name.md
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for all resources. Prioritize official documentation.
instructions.buildFocus: Resources should enable SWEObeyMe to: (1) understand vsce packaging, (2) configure esbuild correctly, (3) implement deployment patterns, (4) set up CI/CD pipelines, (5) follow build best practices.
